value.description:
A gravship shelf. Sleek and sturdy enough to survive the rigors of spaceflight.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 6 Stack per tile: 3
Allowed items: Everything

A small gravship shelf. Compact enough to fit into tight corridors.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 3 Stack per tile: 3
Allowed items: Everything

A gravship shelf with a glass front. Allows a quick visual inventory check while in transit.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 6 Stack per tile: 3
Allowed items: Everything

A double-tiered gravship shelf. Extra capacity for ships with limited floor space.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 12 Stack per tile: 6
Allowed items: Everything

A gravship weapon rack. Keeps arms secured and accessible during flight.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 3 Stack per tile: 3
Allowed items: Weapons

A gravship cargo crate. Reinforced corners and magnetic latches keep contents secure.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 32 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Everything

A large gravship cargo crate. Standard freight container for gravship cargo holds.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 72 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Everything

A long gravship cargo crate. Spans the full length of a cargo bay wall.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 80 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Everything
